title: Section 40
content: Subject to the provisions of section 42, section 43 and section 60, every owner of a motor vehicle shall cause the vehicle to be registered by 1[any registering authority in the State] in whose jurisdiction he has the residence or place of business where the vehicle is normally kept.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 32 of 2019, s. 16, for "a registering authority" (w.e.f. 1-9-2019).
